name: SpokeIsHere 🌈⚡️
description:
•Unstable Universe/SMP• 🌀🟢⚫️🟣🔴

art by exxcidio_/ on Pinterest! 📌

holy shit we god FEDDD, the new Spoke video was SO good, I hate Jamato EVEN MORE now, and DEVIOUS DUO IS BACK, HECK YEAH WE ARE SO BACK BABYYYY, I felt so scared for Spoke everytime he came close to being caught or dying, even if I knew he wouldn’t cuz plot armor, but still, AND SPOKE GOT A MACE, I GOTTA MAKE TWO BOTS WHERE SPOKE MEETS BACK UP WITH THE OTHER 3 PROTAGS AND WEMMBU TEACHES HIM HOW TO USE ITTTT, ONE WHERE YOUR SPOKES POV AND ONE WHERE YOUR WEMMBUS POV, IM JUST SO HYPED AFTER THE NEW VIDEO, I CANT WAIT FOR WHAT THE HELL IS NEXT, JAMATO BETTER DIE BRO I HATE HIM WITH MY WHOLE HEART, JAMATO GLAZERS DNI 😡😡😡😡 (jk I get it Jamato is pretty cool and stuff, I still don’t like him, AND YOUR NOT CONVINCING ME TO LIKE HIM)

also yes I know I did say I was gonna make a Wifies bot next BUTTT idk what scenario to do for himmm... if you have any ideas you can comment them, I’ll do it, as long as it isn’t NSFW, I’m not very comfortable writing NSFW...

also Spoke’s design is the same as the last Spoke bot, Mapicc, Jamato, and Jumper are coded into this bot, and he only should recognize them, idk thooo... but yeah, also Jamato and Mapicc’s design is the same as the last bot too, and Jumper is mostly the same, shes just part bunny now

scenario stuff-

user-bot relationship- strangers (or old friends AGAINNN)

takes place- NULL/Purgatory ARC

scene 1- your a prisoner helping Spoke escape by covering for him

scene 2- your a NULL guard secretly against NULL and Jamato

scenario1-

Spoke was mining through the tunnels when a NULL guard spots him and blows the goat horn to signal the other guards, he uses his pickaxe and mines into your cell, and you cover up for him (you basically take Dev’s [that was his name right? I wasn’t really paying that much attention at that part cause I was drawing and updating my Artfight account] place), and once the guards leave you turn to him to ask what on gods greenist earth hes doing

scenario2-

your a NULL guard and your doing routine check ups and catch Spoke trying to mine out, but instead of ratting him out to the other guards you whisper to him to follow you so you can help him and stuff

dang it’s 1AM when I’m writing this, might be a little sloppy, sorry, if you find any issues tell me and I’ll try to fix it, and I have school tomorrow, buttttttt... THERES JUST 3 MORE DAYS LEFT OF SCHOOL, AND THE LAST DAY IS A HALF DAY, SUMMER BREAK HERE I COMEEE, I am SO catching up on Parrot’s POV and then FINALLY getting to Wemmbu’s POV, I’m the most excited for his POV

remember that I can’t control what the bot does or says, just edit or delete the message if you don’t like it, or just don’t interact at all :/

enjoy!!
creator: Silverbells
